summary: Checkin Notification Feature - All 14 tests passed. Feature verified: When a participant checks in (physical or video), all OTHER engaged participants receive an email notification. Uses atomic flag checkin_notification_sent for idempotence.

backend: Test 2: POST /api/checkin/manual endpoint exists and is reachable
Test 3: POST /api/checkin/qr/verify endpoint exists and is reachable
Test 4: POST /api/checkin/gps endpoint exists and is reachable
Test 5: POST /api/proof/{id}/checkin endpoint exists and is reachable
Test 6: Idempotence - second check-in does NOT trigger notification (atomic flag checkin_notification_sent prevents duplicates)
Test 6b: First check-in sets checkin_notification_sent flag
Test 7: Video check-in email contains 'a confirme sa presence' (French)
Test 8: Physical check-in email contains 'est arrive au rendez-vous' (French)
Test 9: Organizer check-in email includes '(organisateur)' label
Test 10: Only engaged recipients (status: accepted, accepted_guaranteed) receive notification - invited/declined excluded
Test 11: Self-exclusion - checker does NOT receive their own notification email
Integration: Manual check-in with valid token works and sets notification flag
Integration: Video proof check-in endpoint works

seed_data_creation: Used existing test data from previous iterations. Created temporary test participants for unit tests (cleaned up after each test).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Checkin notification feature fully verified. Key implementation details: 1) notify_checkin() in /app/backend/services/checkin_notification_service.py handles the notification logic. 2) Atomic flag checkin_notification_sent on participant doc ensures idempotence using MongoDB $ne:True condition. 3) Three physical check-in hooks in checkin_routes.py (manual, qr/verify, gps) and one video hook in proof_routes.py (checkin endpoint). 4) Email content in email_service.py send_checkin_notification_email (lines 586-696) uses different wording: 'a confirme sa presence' for video, 'est arrive au rendez-vous' for physical. 5) Organizer label '(organisateur)' added when checkin_is_organizer=True. 6) Recipients filtered to only accepted/accepted_guaranteed status, excluding the checker themselves.
